summary.why: Release-generated report bodies retained their own Markdown title while Timbermill already rendered the frontmatter title, breaking the one-h1 page invariant.
summary.how: Applied the existing changelog heading-strip convention to both example generators and removed duplicate headings from the regenerated digest and project update.

notes: The v0.26.0 binary release succeeded; only the Pages workflow failed. Kept the report templates' standalone-document headings and normalized at the publishing-example boundary.
